message:
✨ Add multi-repo support and improved UX for GitHub Activity card

- Add preset popular repos for quick selection
- Persist saved repos and current repo to localStorage
- Show accurate PR/issue counts via separate API calls
- Display full settings panel even in error state
- Add rate limit awareness message for unauthenticated users
- Enable repo switching with dropdown selector
- Allow adding custom repos and removing saved ones

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

openPRCount + setOpenIssueCount(match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : 1) + } else { + const openIssues = await openIssuesResponse.json() + setOpenIssueCount(openIssues.filter((i: any) => !i.pull_request).length) + } + } + + if (!recentIssuesResponse.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to fetch issues: ${recentIssuesResponse.statusText}`) + const issuesData: GitHubIssue[] = await recentIssuesResponse.json() // Filter out pull requests (they come with issues endpoint but have pull_request field) setIssues(issuesData.filter((issue: GitHubIssue & { pull_request?: unknown }) => !issue.pull_request)) @@ -221,6 +288,8 @@ function useGitHubActivity(config?: GitHubActivityConfig) { isRefreshing, error, lastRefresh, + openPRCount, + openIssueCount, refetch: () => fetchGitHubData(true), } } @@ -231,20 +300,34 @@ export function GitHubActivity({ config }: { config?: GitHubActivityConfig }) { const [sortDirection, setSortDirection] = useState('desc') const [itemsPerPage, setItemsPerPage] = useState(10) const [timeRange, setTimeRange] = useState<'7d' | '30d' | '90d' | '1y'>(config?.timeRange || '30d') - return config - }, [config, customRepo]) + }, [showRepoDropdown]) const { prs, @@ -256,24 +339,55 @@ export function GitHubActivity({ config }: { config?: GitHubActivityConfig }) { isRefreshing, error, lastRefresh, + openPRCount, + openIssueCount, refetch, } = useGitHubActivity(effectiveConfig) - Tip: Add a GitHub token via localStorage.setItem('github_token', 'ghp_...') for higher rate limits.
